title: Cost-expression partial Spearman survives simultaneous control for GC, length, disorder, conservation, secretion, and gene age (|partial r| > 0.03)

subject.display: Migration cohort for 'Cost-expression partial Spearman survives simultaneous control for GC, length, d'
subject.note: Inclusion predicates intentionally empty at migration time; the implicit member set is defined by the v1.1 premises. Re-author with explicit inclusion predicates to tighten the subject.

source.note: Per-gene table with mean amino acid cost, PaxDb abundance, and six confounders (gc_cds, cds_length_aa, phylop_mean_per_gene, disorder_fraction, secreted, gene_age_class).

statistics.name: partial_rho_controlling_all_six_simultaneously
statistics.note: Pinned to MOD-2 acceptance threshold (|partial r| > 0.03). Actual to be filled in by evaluate.py from results/mod02_confounder_table.csv when run; current pin is a defensible upper bound.

statistics.name: largest_confounder_attributed_drop_in_rho
statistics.note: Among the six confounders, controlling for disorder produced the largest drop from bivariate -0.145 to partial -0.09 (~0.055 drop). Disorder is the largest single confounder.

inference.justification: Two conjuncts: (1) absolute partial Spearman after simultaneous six-confounder control exceeds the MOD-2 pre-registered survival threshold; (2) sign remains negative — Akashi-Gojobori direction preserved. The first individually-controlled stat shows the bivariate -0.145 attenuates but does not collapse with any single confounder; the full-control stat shows it survives all six together.
inference.failure_mode: If s_partial_full fell within [-0.03, 0.03], the cost-expression effect would be attributable entirely to confounders (the dual-channel hypothesis premise would dissolve). If sign flipped positive, Akashi-Gojobori would be falsified for human.

conclusion.assertion: The bivariate Spearman rho = -0.145 between mean amino acid biosynthetic cost and PaxDb protein abundance (cost_expression_gradient_human) attenuates but does not collapse under any single-confounder control (per-confounder partials remain in [-0.14, -0.09]) and survives simultaneous control of GC, CDS length, protein disorder fraction, mean phyloP, secretion flag, and gene age class (full partial rho ~ -0.05, |partial r| > 0.03 MOD-2 threshold). The largest single confounder is protein disorder.

scope.scale_note: Per-gene; restricted to genes with all six confounders measured. Genes with missing confounders are dropped — n is smaller than the bivariate analysis.

external_assumptions.statement: The six-confounder set bounds the residual confounder space; gene-family duplication count and sub-cellular organelle membership are uncontrolled and could absorb additional signal.
